negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_77d0e6a8-1477-4942-8079-3070f5bb3a63
prompt: In a medium shot at eye level, two women in traditional attire engage enthusiastically with the camera against a plain beige wall. The scene is captured with a vignetted frame, adding a subtle vignette effect. The woman on the left, adorned in a teal saree with a bronze chain ornament along the lining, wears large bronze earrings and a small round golden nose pin. Her long black hair cascades around her shoulders. The woman on the right, dressed in a pink saree with purple lining and golden patterns, complements her ensemble with a matching purple blouse and a long golden necklace featuring a flat, complex circular pattern pendant. She also wears medium golden bell-shaped earrings and has her black hair combed back, with small white decorations visible behind her ears. Two small white spots are noticeable on her left shoulder.  Initially, the woman on the left turns her face slightly towards the other woman with a warm smile. The woman on the right responds with a pouting expression before both look directly at the camera. The woman in the pink saree initiates the conversation, followed by the woman in the teal saree. As she speaks, the woman in the teal saree suddenly makes a quick, palms-down gesture with her forearms extended outward, accompanied by a wide-open smile and a head shake. The woman in the pink saree glances at her friend. Subsequently, both women lean forward slightly for emphasis, with the camera zooming in a little, capturing their dynamic interaction. The scene is moderately lit, with cool-toned light streaming in from the left side of the frame.
